meta.title: Belong — Immigration Status in Israel
meta.description: A digital platform to help regularize your status in Israel. Personal, professional, and discreet guidance.

hero.headline: You deserve to feel at home.
hero.subheadline: Professional and discreet guidance for regularizing your status in Israel. We're here for you.

process.title: How It Works
process.step1Desc: Fill a short questionnaire or talk to us — we'll understand your situation and check if we can help.
process.step2Desc: A personal 20-minute call. We'll show you your path and answer all your questions.
process.step3Desc: We handle all the bureaucracy. You get updates at every step.

whyBelong.title: Why Belong?
whyBelong.reason1Desc: We're a guidance service, not a cold, intimidating office. We talk to you at eye level.
whyBelong.reason2Desc: Licensed attorneys oversee every case behind the scenes. You're in good hands.
whyBelong.reason3Desc: Direct WhatsApp updates, a transparent timeline — you always know your status.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: No. Belong is a guidance service for status regularization, backed by licensed attorneys in Israel.
faq.q2: How long does the process take?
faq.a2: It depends on the type of application. During your consultation, we'll present an expected timeline for your case.
faq.q3: What happens if my application is rejected?
faq.a3: We also handle appeals. We don't leave you in the middle.
faq.q4: What languages do you work in?
faq.a4: Hebrew and English. Russian, Amharic, and Filipino coming soon.
faq.q5: How much does the service cost?
faq.a5: Pricing depends on the type of application. During your consultation, we'll present the exact price and payment options.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.subtitle: Check your eligibility — a free 20-minute call, no commitment.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Check
eligibility.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll check how we can help you.
eligibility.name: Full Name
eligibility.yearsInIsrael: How many years have you been in Israel?
eligibility.hasChildren: Do you have children born in Israel?
eligibility.hasSpouse: Do you have an Israeli spouse?
eligibility.hasWork: Do you have steady employment in Israel?
eligibility.additionalInfo: Anything else important for us to know?

book.title: Book a Consultation
book.subtitle: A personal 20-minute call — we'll understand your situation and present the right path.
book.noCalendly: To book a call, contact us on WhatsApp.

payment.title: Choose Payment Plan
payment.subtitle: Select your preferred payment method.
payment.restrictedDesc: To view payment options, contact us on WhatsApp or book a consultation call.

welcome.title: Welcome to Belong!
welcome.subtitle: We're glad you joined. Here's what to do now:
welcome.whatsappNote: You'll receive a WhatsApp message from our team within minutes.

documents.title: Document Upload
documents.subtitle: Upload the required documents by category.
documents.dragDrop: Drag files here or click to browse
documents.maxSize: Up to 10MB per file (PDF, JPG, PNG)
